title: callistopteris polyanthos
intro: Callistopteris polyanthos, also known as the Asian maidenhair, is a type of fern plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Callistopteris polyanthos include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying and infusing the leaves, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
